questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "visit"?
questions.explanation: "visit" có nghĩa là "thăm".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "recent"?
questions.explanation: "recent" có nghĩa là "gần đây".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "so far"?
questions.explanation: "so far" có nghĩa là "cho đến nay".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "opportunity"?
questions.explanation: "opportunity" có nghĩa là "cơ hội".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "adventure"?
questions.explanation: "adventure" có nghĩa là "cuộc phiêu lưu".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "memorable"?
questions.explanation: "memorable" có nghĩa là "đáng nhớ".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "explore"?
questions.explanation: "explore" có nghĩa là "khám phá".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "attempt"?
questions.explanation: "attempt" có nghĩa là "cố gắng/lần thử".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "complete"?
questions.explanation: "complete" có nghĩa là "hoàn thành".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "encounter"?
questions.explanation: "encounter" có nghĩa là "gặp gỡ/đối mặt".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "worthwhile"?
questions.explanation: "worthwhile" có nghĩa là "đáng giá".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "overcome"?
questions.explanation: "overcome" có nghĩa là "vượt qua".

questions.question: Choose the best word: It was a _____ journey.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "It was a memorable journey." — từ đúng là "memorable" (đáng nhớ).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I have _____d many cities.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I have explored many cities." — từ đúng là "explore" (khám phá).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He has _____ed the test twice.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He has attempted the test twice." — từ đúng là "attempt" (cố gắng/lần thử).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She has _____d the project.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She has completed the project." — từ đúng là "complete" (hoàn thành).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I have _____ed many cultures.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I have encountered many cultures." — từ đúng là "encounter" (gặp gỡ/đối mặt).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The effort has been _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The effort has been worthwhile." — từ đúng là "worthwhile" (đáng giá).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She has _____ many problems.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She has overcome many problems." — từ đúng là "overcome" (vượt qua).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I have _____ed from the course.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I have benefited from the course." — từ đúng là "benefit" (lợi ích).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He has just _____d.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He has just graduated." — từ đúng là "graduate" (tốt nghiệp).

questions.question: Choose the best word: They have _____d to Hanoi.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "They have relocated to Hanoi." — từ đúng là "relocate" (chuyển chỗ ở).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Scientists have _____ed a new planet.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Scientists have discovered a new planet." — từ đúng là "discover" (khám phá ra).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I have _____d in many events.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I have participated in many events." — từ đúng là "participate" (tham gia).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I ___ already finished my homework.
questions.explanation: Present perfect with 'I' uses 'have'.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She ___ never been to Japan.
questions.explanation: Third person singular uses 'has'.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Have you ___ eaten sushi?
questions.explanation: 'Ever' asks about experience in questions.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: They have lived here ___ 2015.
questions.explanation: 'Since' is used with a point in time.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: We have known each other ___ ten years.
questions.explanation: 'For' is used with a period of time.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: He ___ just arrived.
questions.explanation: Present perfect with 'just' for recent action.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I haven't finished ___.
questions.explanation: 'Yet' in negatives means up to now.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She has ___ seen that film.
questions.explanation: 'Already' shows something happened before now.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Have they ___ arrived?
questions.explanation: 'Yet' in questions asks if something happened.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I have ___ to Paris twice.
questions.explanation: 'Have been to' means visited and returned.

questions.question: Which English word means "thăm"?
questions.explanation: "thăm" trong tiếng Anh là "visit".

questions.question: Which English word means "gần đây"?
questions.explanation: "gần đây" trong tiếng Anh là "recent".

questions.question: Which English word means "cho đến nay"?
questions.explanation: "cho đến nay" trong tiếng Anh là "so far".

questions.question: Which English word means "cơ hội"?
questions.explanation: "cơ hội" trong tiếng Anh là "opportunity".

questions.question: Which English word means "cuộc phiêu lưu"?
questions.explanation: "cuộc phiêu lưu" trong tiếng Anh là "adventure".

questions.question: Which English word means "đáng nhớ"?
questions.explanation: "đáng nhớ" trong tiếng Anh là "memorable".
